name: Kahlua Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie dish with the crust and chill.
2. Preheat oven to 450°F.
3. Combine milk, Kahlua, sugar, corn syrup, spice, and salt in a bowl.
4. Add pumpkin and eggs; stir until combined.
5. Pour mixture into prepared pie shell.
6. Bake pastry for 7-8 minutes at 450°F until lightly browned.
7. Remove the dish from the oven and place it back inside while lowering the temperature to 325°F.
8. Reduce heat and bake about 40 minutes.
9. For Kahlua Cream Topping: Beat whipping cream with Kahlua in a separate bowl until stiff peaks form.
10. Pour topping into serving bowl and drizzle remaining Kahlua on top.
